[http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php/main:modding_docs:lua:classes Copied from [here].]

[[Lua]] is used to [[Gusanos Maps|script maps]] or [[Gusanos Modding|script mods]].

== Global ==
* [[Lua global|Global functions]]

== Classes ==
* [[Lua bitmap|Bitmap]]
* [[Lua bitstream|Bitstream]]
* [[Lua font|Font]]
* [[Lua networkgameevent|NetworkGameEvent]]
* [[Lua networkparticleevent|NetworkParticleEvent]]
* [[Lua networkplayerevent|NetworkPlayerEvent]]
* [[Lua networkwormevent|NetworkWormEvent]]
* [[Lua object|Object]]
* [[Lua particle|Particle]]
* [[Lua player|Player]]
* [[Lua sound|Sound]]
* [[Lua spriteset|SpriteSet]]
* [[Lua viewport|Viewport]]
* [[Lua weapon|Weapon]]
* [[Lua weapontype|WeaponType]]
* [[Lua worm|Worm]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721122844/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Lua_classes -->
